item.title: Brow Tips for More Lid Space
item.description: Did you know your brows are the key to more lid space? Pushing hair up creates a clean canvas for your shadow

media:content.media:title: Brow Tips for More Lid Space
media:content.media:description: Did you know your brows are the key to more lid space? Pushing hair up creates a clean canvas for your shadow

item.title: Winged Cut Crease Tips for Hooded Eyes
item.description: Creating a winged cut crease on hooded eyes is easier than you think. Let me show you how.

media:content.media:title: Winged Cut Crease Tips for Hooded Eyes
media:content.media:description: Creating a winged cut crease on hooded eyes is easier than you think. Let me show you how.
